title: Mummified Alien Corpse
dialogue: "I, too, had found a body at the quarry in a hole, half - buried under rocks. But the buzzards, who will eat anything, would not touch it." - Albert Hosteen

title: Cosmic Alignment
dialogue:
Zirinka: "Well, we're heading into a rare planetary alignment, where Mercury, Mars, and Uranus are extreme influences."
Mulder: "On what?"

title: Oil-Based Alien
dialogue: "For the first time, we saw the enemy that was killing us. That thing was causing the slow, painful deaths." - Sick Crewman

title: Lord Kinbote
dialogue: "Be thou not afraid! No harm will come unto thee." - Lord Kinbote

title: Jeremiah Smith, Alien Clone
dialogue:
Jeremiah Smith: "I no longer believe in the greater purpose."
Cigarette - Smoking Man: "Then your fate is just."

title: Agrarian Drones (Preadolescent Alien/Human Workforce)
dialogue:
Mulder: "Who takes care of them?"
Jeremiah Smith: "They take care of themselves. Parenting is unnecessary. A needless division of energy."

title: Fortean Encounter
dialogue: "They came from the sky, more Chupacabras. I slammed the door and prayed that they would not come to kill me, too." - Flakita

title: Alien Reconnaissance
dialogue: "He found Sharon Graffia wandering in a daze at the crash site the night we left, after seeing lights over the area." - Scully

title: Unit 731
dialogue: "Four of the doctors you see in this photo were on that videotape I showed you, performing that autopsy." - Mulder

title: Secret Government Railroad
dialogue: "Our government is operating a secret railroad. They put something on that train in West Virginia, something living." - Scully

title: The Syndicate
dialogue: "You may all be wondering why I've called you here on such short notice. We've received disturbing reports from our intelligence sources." - First Elder

title: Subliminal Killers
dialogue: "Studies into subliminal influence have shown a correlation between heightened suggestibility and the manipulation of this response." - Byers

title: The Kennedy Assassination
dialogue: "It appears something has happened on the motorcade route. Does anyone know what has happened?" - Unnamed Man

title: Gulag Vaccination Experiments
dialogue: "You have been exposed to the Black Cancer. The cancer that lives in the rock." - Russian Prisoner

title: Bonita Charne-Sayre, Virologist
dialogue: "She's a well - known physician and a virologist who's looked in on presidents. She's also an authority on variola viruses." - Scully

title: Dr. Kevin Scanlon
dialogue:
Mulder: "Did Byers tell you about Dr. Scanlon? He may very well have killed those women."
Scully: "That will have to be proven, if we find him."

title: Government-Engineered Honeybees (Smallpox Eradication Program)
dialogue:
Skinner: "What are they?"
Mulder: "Bee stingers and venom sacs recovered subcutaneously from the victim's face, arm and neck."

title: Darin Peter Oswald, The Lightning Boy
dialogue:
Scully: "You're saying he's some kind of lightning rod?"
Mulder: "No, I'm saying that he is lightning."

title: Virgil Incanto, Mutated Vampire
dialogue: "What possible motivation could the killer have for removing his victim's fatty tissue?" - Scully

title: Pvt. Leonard Trimble, Astral Projectionist
dialogue: "What you're saying is this man, Rappo, is leaving his body and floating around town killing people?" - Scully

title: Empathic Transferrence
dialogue: "I don't know how to explain it, but I think that Wade's abduction of Amy triggered some kind of physical response in Lucy." - Mulder

title: Robert Patrick Modell, a.k.a. Pusher
dialogue:
Mulder: "I'm going to kill you, Modell."
Pusher: "Yeah, pull the trigger, you get another crack at me."

title: The Teliko
dialogue: "It was said they rested by day in close, dark places, deep inside tree hollows and in holes beneath the ground too small even for a child to hide himself." - Minister Diabria

title: Albert Tanner, a.k.a. Leonard Betts
dialogue: "I think that what we're standing witness to here goes way beyond the regeneration of a thumb or a limb or even a new head." - Mulder

title: Eddie Van Blundht, Shapeshifter
dialogue:
Scully: "But what are you saying, that that Van Blundht is an alien?"
Mulder: "Not unless they have trailer parks in space. No, this is something different."

title: The Bellhop Killer, a.k.a. Puppet
dialogue:
Clyde Bruckman: "Was that not enough of a tip?"
Puppet: "They brought you right to me, right to where I work."

title: The Peacocks, Incestuous Family Clan
dialogue: "Let them know, this is our home and this is the way it's going to stay." - Mrs. Peacock

title: Gerry Thomas Schnauz, Thoughtograph Killer
dialogue: "You look...troubled." - Gerry Schnauz

title: John Lee Roche, The Mad Hatter
dialogue: "It was a difficult case, he was extremely hard to catch. By 1990, ten victims had been found scattered across the eastern seaboard." - Mulder on apprehending Roche

title: Betty, The Talking Tattoo
dialogue: "From now on, I'm your right - hand gal. You and me. As long as I'm with you, no one will ever hurt you. Never again." - Betty's voice

title: Sgt. Nathaniel Teager, Avenging P.O.W.
dialogue: "Whatever you do to me won't change his mind, General. He's sending a message and making damn sure everyone hears it loud and clear." - Denny Markham

title: Futuristic Freezing Compound
dialogue: "Traces of the compound were detected in a man who was found dead last night, frozen solid." - Scully

title: Dr. Charles Goldstein
dialogue:
Mulder: "You put a hole in my head."
Dr. Goldstein: "A slight electrical stimulation."

title: Gargoyle Spirit
dialogue: "Is this evil something born in each of us? Crouching in the shadow of every human soul waiting to emerge? Is this the monster called madness?" - Mulder

title: Jaguar Spirit
dialogue:
Scully: "What are we talking here, Mulder, a possessed rat? The return of Ben?"
Mulder: "No, I think those rats were killed trying to escape from something."

title: Tong Organ Lottery
dialogue:
Scully: "Your father had an HLA but he also had his kidneys measured, his liver."
Mulder: "They're playing some kind of game."

title: The Night Hag
dialogue: "According to Skinner's psychiatrist, he's been experiencing a recurring dream in which he's confronted by an old woman. She speaks to him but he doesn't understand the words." - Scully

title: Melissa Riedal-Ephesian, Cultist
dialogue: "Twenty - sixth of November. 1863. I was here. As were you. This is the field where I watched you die." - Melissa to Mulder

title: Dr. Jack Franklin, Occult Practitioner
dialogue:
Scully: "This kind of transformation is medically impossible."
Mulder: "It's not medicine, Scully. It's blood sacrifice."

title: Isaac Luria, The Golem
dialogue: "I don't think it was hate that created this, Scully. I think it was love." - Mulder

title: Harbingers of Death
dialogue: "What is a death omen if not a vision of our own mortality? And who among us would most likely be able to see the dead?" - Mulder

title: Assistant Director Walter Skinner
gameEffect: Treat Assistant Director Skinner as a RES 3 if he is in the Bureau Section of the table.
bio: While supervising the X - Files unit, Assistant Director Walter Skinner has demonstrated unwavering loyalty to Agents Mulder and Scully. Upon learning that Scully has contracted cancer, Skinner submits to the Cigarette - Smoking Man's bidding in exchange for a cure ("Zero Sum").

title: Agent Alex Krycek
gameEffect: Agent Krycek allows you to choose to add to the Conspiracy Pool instead of the Resource Pool during the Briefing Phase.
bio: As a rogue operative with shifting allegiances, Alex Krycek was recruited by an extremist militia operating out of New York. Upon his arrest Krycek convinced Mulder to enlist him in a dangerous investigation in the former Soviet Union ("Tunguska"). After double - crossing Mulder to align himself with Russian conspirators, Krycek would undergo forced amputation of his left arm by anti - Gulag rebels ("Terma").

title: Section Chief Scott Blevins
gameEffect: Treat Section Chief Blevins as a RES 2 if he is in the Bureau Section. If he is in the Bureau Section, he may contribute to the Conspiracy Pool instead of the Resources Pool during the Briefing Phase.
bio: Previously the supervisor of the X - Files unit, Section Chief Scott Blevins later led a joint FBI committee to investigation the legitimacy of Agent Mulder's work and his apparent suicide. Blevins questioned Agent Scully as she appeared to detail the deception to which she believed Mulder had succumbed.
